creator: ino-qc@spotteswoode.de.eu.org
text:
> Rong-En Fan:

> I guess you have devel/ncurses installed. Remove that and python 2.4
> can be built just fine. In my test, both 2.4.3 and 2.4.4 failed if
> devel/ncurses is installed.

yes, that was it!  i needed to re-install rxvt-unicode, which depended
on devel/ncurses, but this is possible using a make tunable.

> That's just an workaround. There were some discussion on -ports@ last
> week or so.

sorry i missed that, and thanks for the advice!


regards, clemens
